sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65659" key="mequ/mnion" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεθ-ύμνιον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ μετὰ τὸν ὕμνον, ἢ ἡ μετὰ μέθης ᾠδή</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
